title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.320 - Verdict may be corrected in matters of form
text:
534.320.  Verdict may be corrected in matters of form. — No verdict shall be set aside for informality, but the judge may in the presence of the jury, correct the same in matters of form, changing no matter of substance.
(RSMo 1939 § 2848, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2462; 1919 § 3010; 1909 § 7672 
Effective 1-02-79
